data.content:
# Handoff — Implementation → Implementation Review

## Artifact
- **Branch:** `foolery-3200-hermetic-tests`
- **Commit on origin/main:** `819fc50f` (`8e930697..819fc50f`, fast-forward)
- **PR:** none (per project policy: direct push to main)

## What changed (incremental over 8e930697)

Closes the gap from the prior implementation review (non-hermetic
fs/promises fixture tests + source-grep contract tests left in default
suite).

- **Moved 64 non-hermetic test files** from `src/**/__tests__/` to the
  matching `src/**/__manual_tests__/` directory:
  - 50 from `src/lib/__tests__/` (Cat A fs/promises fixture tests +
    Cat B `process.cwd()` source-grep contract tests, plus the
    `validate-cwd.test.ts` host-cwd reader)
  - 13 from `src/components/__tests__/` (Cat B contract tests +
    `dropdown-menu-modal`, `select-popper-position`)
  - 1 from `src/app/beats/__tests__/`
- **Split 2 mixed files**: kept hermetic test cases in `__tests__/`,
  moved source-grep cases to a sibling `__manual_tests__/` file:
  - `src/components/.../bulk-edit-terminal-states.test.ts`
  - `src/hooks/.../scope-refinement-pending-integration.test.ts`
- **Created** `src/components/__manual_tests__/` and
  `src/hooks/__manual_tests__/` (both newly tracked).
- **Fixed cross-dir imports** in two moved files that referenced
  helpers still in `__tests__/`:
  - `backends-mark-terminal-parity.test.ts` →
    `../__tests__/mock-backend-port`
  - `beads-backend-contract.test.ts` →
    `../__tests__/backend-contract.test`

## How to verify

```sh
git fetch origin && git checkout 819fc50f  # or origin/main
bun install --frozen-lockfile
bun run lint
bunx tsc --noEmit
bun run test          # 246 files, 2656 passes (hermetic)
bun run test:manual   # 77 files, 546 passes (opt-in)
bun run build
```

Hermeticity grep matrix (must all be empty against `src/**/__tests__/`):

```sh
rg -l 'from "node:fs"|from "node:fs/promises"' src --glob 'src/**/__tests__/**'
rg -ln 'process\.(cwd|chdir|env)' src --glob 'src/**/__tests__/**'
rg -ln 'readFileSync|writeFileSync|mkdirSync|rmSync|mkdtemp|tmpdir\(\)' src --glob 'src/**/__tests__/**'
```

All return empty after this commit.

## Acceptance check

- [x] Each test file under `src/**/__tests__/` is hermetic per docs/DEVELOPING.md
- [x] Non-hermetic tests moved to `src/**/__manual_tests__/` (or split, preserving the hermetic portion)
- [x] `bun run test` passes deterministically regardless of host state
- [x] Commit + branch tagged on the knot
